name: Northlake Dowel Frame Sling Ottoman Cream - Threshold™
description:
Simple yet unique, this Northlake Dowel Frame Sling Ottoman from Threshold™ adds a farmhouse-style touch to your decor. The natural wooden frame with clean lines creates a sophisticated look while the inverted rectangular design along the sides enhance the visual appeal. Upholstered in a textured cream fabric, this wood-frame ottoman provides the perfect base for sitting, resting your feet or serving drinks and more. Just add a sling chair to create a complete relaxation spot.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

"Overall Width: 26.25 inches
Overall Height: 19.5 inches
Overall Depth: 16 inches
Seat Height: 16.5 inches
Arm Height: 19.5 inches
Seat Depth: 9.5 inches"
